content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33511603/", "source_title": "Aging Methods-An Evaluation of Their Influence on Bond Strength", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Materials and methods: A total of 96 noncarious human third molars were prepared and randomly divided according to three factors (n = 6): su...", "direct_quote": "Materials and methods: A total of 96 noncarious human third molars were prepared and randomly divided according to three factors (n = 6): substrate (enamel and dentin), adhesive approach (SE and ER), and aging method (water storage for 24 hours, 6 mo", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Statistical analysis: Microshear bond strength tests were conducted, and the collected data (MPa) were subjected to three-way analysis of va...", "direct_quote": "Statistical analysis: Microshear bond strength tests were conducted, and the collected data (MPa) were subjected to three-way analysis of variance (ANOVA) with post hoc Bonferroni tests (p < 0.05) and Weibull analysis.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Results: Three-way ANOVA revealed that the factors \"substrate\" (p = 0.00) and \"aging method\" (p = 0.00) had a significant effect on the bond...", "direct_quote": "Results: Three-way ANOVA revealed that the factors \"substrate\" (p = 0.00) and \"aging method\" (p = 0.00) had a significant effect on the bond strength, but the factor \"adhesive approach\" did not (p = 0.84).", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
